title: Reverse Bits
problem_statement: Reverse the bits of a given 32-bit unsigned integer.
constraints: The input is a 32-bit unsigned integer.
intuition: Build the reversed result bit by bit by shifting and appending the lowest bit of the input.

approaches.name: Bitwise reverse with shifting
approaches.description: Shift the result left and append the input’s lowest bit, then shift the input right until all 32 bits are processed.
approaches.why_not: Converting to string and reversing is unnecessary and slower than bit manipulation.

interview_qa.q: What kind of shift is used on n?
interview_qa.a: Unsigned right shift (>>>) so zero bits are shifted in from the left.
The input has 32 bits and every bit must be reversed.
